pages.text: Adds bonus attack damage on hit.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Quartz at an anvil.
pages.title: Sharp

pages.text: Each level adds +1.5 mining and attack speed.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Redstone at an anvil.
pages.title: Haste

pages.text: Each level boosts ore drops and mob drops, scaling like Fortune and Looting.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Lapis Lazuli at an anvil.
pages.title: Lapis Blessing

pages.text: Harvests blocks intact.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Emerald at an anvil.
pages.title: Silky

pages.text: Hits send targets flying.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Slime Ball at an anvil.
pages.title: Knockback

pages.text: Sets targets on fire.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Blaze Powder at an anvil.
pages.title: Fiery

pages.text: Increases durability per level.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Obsidian at an anvil.
pages.title: Reinforced

pages.text: Widens the mining hammer's break area.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Sticky Piston at an anvil.
pages.title: Excavating

pages.text: Adds significant bonus attack damage.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Nether Star at an anvil.
pages.title: Nether Sharpened

pages.text: Spear attack hurls you forward; consumes hunger. Requires food ≥ 7, on solid ground, out of water..$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Phantom Membrane at an anvil.
pages.title: Lunge

pages.text: Chance to teleport your target a short distance on hit.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Ender Pearl at an anvil.
pages.title: Ender Affinity

pages.text: Stays with you through death.$(br2)$(l)Apply with:$() Totem Of Undying at an anvil.
pages.title: Soulbound
